org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: Skip the Brush Contouring Trio
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.longDescription: It’s makeup made easy. Julep’s innovative Skip The Brush sticks are the convenient 2-in-1 product for monochrome color done fast. Get a radiant blush, plus a matching lip, in just a quick swipe! This trio includes three Skip the Brush 2-in-1 color sticks for cheeks and lips. Neutral Bronze is a neutral golden-bronze, Sheer Glow is a sheer soft-golden and Golden Guava is a shimmering peach-pink. Sculpt, shade and enhance! These colorful blush and bronzer sticks make it easy to get a contoured look without the complicated step-by-step. The color blends directly on your skin – no brushes needed! This curated trio of versatile color sticks includes everything you need to add a flush to your cheeks, a sculpt to your face and a soft luminous glow too! This three-piece set features the best of Julep’s Skip the Brush family, allowing you to create quick and easy looks on the go. Each is blended with rich emollients to moisturize, plus soft-focus powders to blur pores, fine lines and imperfections.

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: 24/7 Shea Butter Balm Lip Treatment
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: 24/7 Shea Butter Balm Lip Treatment
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.longDescription: Your new lip fix. 24/7 Shea Butter Balm Lip Treatment cares for your lips from a.m. to p.m. It’s a lip treatment by day, and a lip sleeping mask by night. The reparative formula, packed with nourishing ingredients, relieves chapped lips and locks in moisture for a smoother, plumper pout. Enriched with shea butter, vitamin E, sunflower seed oil, and anti-aging Songyi mushroom extract, the reparative formula locks in moisture and leaves your lips feeling silky-smooth. With a refreshing vanilla mint scent and a glossy look and feel, you’ll want to wear it 24/7!

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: Charcoal Konjac Face Sponge Exfoliating Cleansing Tool
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: Charcoal Konjac Face Sponge Exfoliating Cleansing Tool
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.longDescription: A super gentle exfoliator made from all-natural Konjac Root and enriched with detoxifying Bamboo Charcoal Powder. Use daily to unveil a smooth canvas for makeup and improve the efficacy of your skincare products. Comes with a suction cup hook for easy shower storage. Sponge will arrive damp. To use: Rinse under warm water before each use. Massage your face in a circular motion to exfoliate dead skin cells. Rinse thoroughly and squeeze out excess water after each use. Replace every 12 months. Make it yours, make it fun. BRAVE PRETTY

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: Length Matters Mascara
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: Length Matters Mascara
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.longDescription: A buildable, jet black mascara with an extreme lengthening formula that coats lashes from root to tip. The unique, finely tapered micro-bristle brush defines individual lashes and layers for a softly curled, wide-eyed look that stretches the limits. To use: Start at the base of your lash line, and pull wand upward smoothly without wiggling. Repeat, applying additional coats until you achieve your desired look. 0.35 oz, 10.1 g

org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.internalName: Skip the Brush 2-in-1 Color Stick for Cheeks and Lips
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.productName: Skip the Brush 2-in-1 Color Stick for Cheeks and Lips
org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product.longDescription: A versatile one-stick wonder that adds instant luminous color to cheeks and lips. Soft-focus powders and ultrafine pearls go on smoothly then set to a long-lasting powder finish. Just swipe on and blend with fingers – no brushes required! To use: Draw three dots along your cheek bones. Blend upwards toward the hairline with your fingers. Dab on eyes and lips for an easy monochromatic look. 0.21 oz, 6 g Make it yours, make it fun. BRAVE PRETTY
